assumption_text: The Karantina massacre estimate is treated as civilian deaths because the retained sources describe a massacre of district residents / camp-adjacent civilians rather than a battlefield exchange.
rationale: This is the most defensible reading of the bounded massacre literature retained here.

assumption_text: Tel al-Zaatar deaths are kept in the unknown-status bin rather than split into civilian and combatant deaths.
rationale: The camp contained armed fighters and the retained sources do not provide a defensible victim-class breakdown.

assumption_text: The Sabra/Shatila death range is left wide rather than collapsed to a narrow point estimate.
rationale: Publicly cited totals still vary sharply and false precision would be misleading.
